THE COURT DENIED THE MOTION FOR PREFERENCE WITHOUT PREJUDICE, HOWEVER SET A TRIAL DATE FOR 11/02/20 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. IF JURY FEES POSTED BY 07/09/20 BY 4:00PM, THEN THE COURT WILL SET THIS CASE AS A JURY TRIAL OTHERWISE MATTER WILL PROCEED AS A COURT TRIAL. MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KATE WILLIAMS'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION.

Matter called at 9:24 a.m.

No appearances made in this matter.

The Court notes that it received notice from plaintiff's counsel of his intent to contest the tentative ruling but then received subsequent notice from plaintiff's counsel of his withdrawal of his intent to contest.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The motion is denied. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

The Court will issue a formal order.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk: Sean; Court Reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR No. 13714, Tel: 415-601-7054, Email: apourtabib@gmail.com (302/JPT)
